title: OData CSDL Reference
description: Reference to an OData 4.01 CSDL (Common Schema Definition Language) document describing the source data model. Preserves the source-native OData metadata without flattening it into a generic schema.

serviceUrl.description: OData service root URL from which $metadata can be fetched

metadataUrl.description: Direct URL to the CSDL document (typically serviceUrl/$metadata)

localCsdlPath.description: Relative path to pinned CSDL document (preferred over live fetch)

pinnedAt.description: When the CSDL was pinned locally

csdlChecksum.description: SHA-256 of the pinned CSDL document
